mapper.insert: insert into upload_file(user_id, material_id, original_name, file_name, file_url, file_size, upload_user, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{materialId}, #{originalName}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadUser}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, material_id, original_name, file_name, file_url, file_size, upload_user, create_time from upload_file where material_id = #{materialId} order by create_time desc, id desc
